0f59b83781b52a8f.descPreview: Entering a valid email address in the subscription box and clicking Subscribe should display a succe

testCases.expectedResult: Subscription success confirmation message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: An error message indicating email is required is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: An error message indicating invalid email format is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: Subscription success confirmation message is displayed

testCases.title: Subscribe with an email containing script injection attempt

testCases.expectedResult: Input is sanitized and an error or success message is displayed without executing script

7015097cd9ed9823.scenario: Scroll to bottom shows subscription widget
7015097cd9ed9823.descPreview: Scrolling to the bottom of the homepage should reveal the newsletter subscription form with an email

testCases.title: Verify newsletter subscription form is visible after scrolling to bottom
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the homepage
testCases.expectedResult: Newsletter subscription form with an email field and Subscribe button is visible

testCases.title: Subscribe to newsletter with a valid email

preconditions: Scroll to the bottom of the homepage

preconditions: Scroll to the bottom of the homepage
steps: Enter an email address with maximum allowed length (e.g. 64 characters before @ and 255 characters total) in the newsletter email field
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription is successful and confirmation message is displayed

testCases.title: Attempt newsletter subscription with email containing SQL injection attempt
preconditions: Scroll to the bottom of the homepage

testCases.expectedResult: Subscription is rejected and no database error or security breach occurs

testCases.title: Attempt newsletter subscription with email containing script injection attempt
preconditions: Scroll to the bottom of the homepage
steps: Enter an email address with script injection payload (e.g. <script>alert('xss')</script>@example.com) in the newsletter email field
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription is rejected and no script is executed or XSS vulnerability occurs

testCases.title: Subscribe with maximum length email containing Unicode characters

testCases.expectedResult: Subscription form either accepts the email and shows success or provides a clear validation error about unsupported characters

testCases.title: Subscribe with maximum length email consisting only of whitespace characters
steps: Enter an email address string at maximum allowed length consisting only of whitespace characters into the subscription field
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription form displays a clear validation error indicating invalid email format

df904a57b74f24b8.descPreview: Clicking the 'Cart' navigation link should load the cart page, displaying either an empty state or p

testCases.title: Navigate to Cart page with empty cart
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page loads displaying an empty cart state prompting user to proceed with checkout/login

testCases.title: Navigate to Cart page after adding a product
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page loads displaying the added product with option to proceed with checkout/login

testCases.title: Verify cart page prompt when user is not logged in
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page displays prompt to login or proceed with checkout

testCases.title: Verify cart page prompt when user is logged in
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page loads displaying cart contents and option to proceed with checkout

testCases.title: Attempt to access cart page via navCartLink with session expired
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page prompts user to login before proceeding with checkout

testCases.title: Verify cart page behavior after removing all items and clicking navCartLink
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page displays empty cart state prompting user to proceed with checkout/login

testCases.title: Verify cart page loads correctly after multiple addToCartButtons clicks
steps: Click addToCartButtons multiple times for different products
testCases.expectedResult: Cart page loads displaying all added products with option to proceed with checkout/login

99d994419dc9f7bd.descPreview: Enter a valid email address and submit the subscription form multiple times in rapid succession. The

testCases.title: Submit valid email once and verify successful subscription
steps: Enter a valid email address in the subscription form
testCases.expectedResult: The system displays the message 'Your product has been added to cart.' indicating successful subscription

testCases.title: Submit valid email multiple times in rapid succession and verify single successful subscription
steps: Enter a valid email address in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 5 times rapidly without waiting for response
testCases.expectedResult: The system processes only one submission and displays 'Your product has been added to cart.' once, ignoring duplicates

testCases.title: Submit invalid email format multiple times rapidly and verify validation error
steps: Enter an invalid email address (e.g., 'invalid-email') in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 3 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system prevents submission and displays an appropriate email validation error message each time

testCases.title: Submit empty email field multiple times rapidly and verify validation error
steps: Leave the email field empty in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 4 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system prevents submission and displays an appropriate 'email required' validation error message each time

testCases.title: Submit valid email with SQL injection attempt multiple times rapidly and verify security
steps: Enter a valid email address containing SQL injection payload (e.g., 'test@example.com; DROP TABLE users;') in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 3 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system sanitizes input, prevents injection, and processes only one valid subscription displaying 'Your product has been added to cart.'

testCases.title: Submit valid email with maximum allowed length multiple times rapidly and verify single subscription
steps: Enter a valid email address with maximum allowed length (e.g., 64 characters before @ and valid domain) in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 6 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system processes only one submission and displays 'Your product has been added to cart.' without errors

testCases.title: Submit valid email with leading and trailing spaces multiple times rapidly and verify single subscription
steps: Enter a valid email address with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., '  user@example.com  ') in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 7 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system trims spaces, processes only one submission, and displays 'Your product has been added to cart.'

testCases.title: Submit valid email multiple times rapidly using different case variations and verify single subscription
steps: Enter a valid email address in uppercase (e.g., 'USER@EXAMPLE.COM') in the subscription form
Submit the subscription form 4 times rapidly
Enter the same email address in lowercase (e.g., 'user@example.com')
Submit the subscription form 4 times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The system treats email case-insensitively and processes only one subscription displaying 'Your product has been added to cart.'

3c1231377d3a086c.descPreview: Clicking the 'Contact us' navigation link should successfully load the contact page without any clie

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page loads successfully on clicking navContactUsLink
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads with no client-side errors and URL changes accordingly

testCases.title: Verify no client-side errors occur when clicking navContactUsLink multiple times rapidly
steps: Click navContactUsLink rapidly 5 times in succession
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads without client-side errors and no UI glitches occur

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page does not load if navContactUsLink is clicked after network failure
preconditions: Simulate network failure or offline mode
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page does not load and a client-side network error message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page resists XSS attacks via navContactUsLink
preconditions: Ensure no malicious scripts are injected into navContactUsLink
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads without executing any injected scripts or showing unexpected popups

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page loads correctly on slow network after clicking navContactUsLink
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads completely without client-side errors despite slow network

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page loads correctly after navigating from navHomeLink then clicking navContactUsLink
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads without client-side errors after navigating from Home page

testCases.title: Verify Contact Us page loads correctly after clicking navProductsLink then navContactUsLink
testCases.expectedResult: Contact Us page loads without client-side errors after navigating from Products page

94b8b2ef7f315b1c.descPreview: Attempt to register using a valid email address that is already linked to an account. Expected outco

testCases.title: Register with an already registered valid email
steps: Enter a valid name in signupNameInput
Enter an email address already linked to an existing account in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the email address is already in use

testCases.title: Register with a new valid email address
steps: Enter a valid name in signupNameInput
Enter a new valid email address not linked to any account in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: User proceeds to the next step of registration without error

testCases.title: Register with empty signupNameInput and valid email
steps: Enter a valid email address not linked to any account in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the name field is required

testCases.title: Register with invalid email format in signupEmailInput
steps: Enter a valid name in signupNameInput
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'user@domain') in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid

testCases.title: Register with SQL injection attempt in signupEmailInput
steps: Enter a valid name in signupNameInput
Enter a SQL injection string (e.g., "test@example.com' OR '1'='1") in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: The system rejects the input and displays a validation error without processing injection

testCases.title: Register with maximum length name and valid email
steps: Enter a name with maximum allowed length (e.g., 255 characters) in signupNameInput
Enter a valid email address not linked to any account in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: User proceeds to the next step of registration without error

testCases.title: Register with whitespace-only name and valid email
steps: Enter whitespace characters only in signupNameInput
Enter a valid email address not linked to any account in signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the name field is required

b4a61a6f27e4f77c.descPreview: Successfully submit the subscription form, navigate to another page (e.g., Products), and then retur

testCases.title: Subscribe with valid email and verify confirmation persists after navigation
steps: Enter a valid email address in the subscription form
Verify the subscription confirmation message is visible
Click navProductsLink to navigate to the Products page
Click navHomeLink to return to the homepage
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription confirmation message remains visible on the homepage after navigation

testCases.title: Attempt subscription with empty email field and verify error handling
steps: Leave the subscription email field empty
testCases.expectedResult: An appropriate validation error message is displayed indicating email is required

testCases.title: Subscribe with invalid email format and verify error message
steps: Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'invalid-email') in the subscription form
testCases.expectedResult: An appropriate validation error message is displayed indicating invalid email format

testCases.title: Subscribe with maximum length email and verify confirmation persists after navigation
steps: Enter a maximum length valid email address (e.g., 64 characters before @) in the subscription form
Verify the subscription confirmation message is visible
Click navProductsLink to navigate to the Products page
Click navHomeLink to return to the homepage
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription confirmation message remains visible on the homepage after navigation

testCases.title: Subscribe with email containing script tags to test XSS vulnerability
steps: Enter an email containing script tags (e.g., '<script>alert(1)</script>@test.com') in the subscription form
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription form rejects the input or sanitizes it without executing scripts, no alert is triggered

testCases.title: Subscribe with email containing leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter a valid email address with leading and trailing spaces in the subscription form
Verify the subscription confirmation message is visible
Click navProductsLink to navigate to the Products page
Click navHomeLink to return to the homepage
testCases.expectedResult: Subscription confirmation message remains visible on the homepage after navigation, spaces are trimmed and email accepted

testCases.title: Subscribe with already subscribed email and verify system behavior
preconditions: Email address has been previously subscribed successfully
steps: Enter the previously subscribed email address in the subscription form
testCases.expectedResult: System displays a message indicating the email is already subscribed or prevents duplicate subscription

d492ea2d975722fd.descPreview: Fill out the Signup form with valid, unique Name and Email Address. Expected outcome: Successful acc

testCases.title: Signup with valid unique Name and Email
steps: Enter a valid unique name into signupNameInput
Enter a valid unique email address into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Successful account creation confirmation message appears or user is redirected to a welcome/account page

testCases.title: Signup with empty Name field
steps: Enter a valid unique email address into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Validation error message indicating Name is required is displayed

testCases.title: Signup with invalid email format
steps: Enter a valid unique name into signupNameInput
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'user@invalid') into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Validation error message indicating invalid email format is displayed

testCases.title: Signup with already registered email
steps: Enter a valid unique name into signupNameInput
testCases.expectedResult: Error message indicating email is already registered is displayed

testCases.title: Signup with Name field at maximum length boundary
steps: Enter a valid unique name with maximum allowed characters (e.g., 255 chars) into signupNameInput
Enter a valid unique email address into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Successful account creation confirmation message appears or user is redirected to a welcome/account page

testCases.title: Signup with script injection attempt in Name field
steps: Enter a script injection string (e.g., '<script>alert(1)</script>') into signupNameInput
Enter a valid unique email address into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Input is sanitized and no script execution occurs; either validation error or successful signup without script execution

testCases.title: Signup with email containing leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter a valid unique name into signupNameInput
Enter a valid unique email address with leading and trailing spaces into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Spaces are trimmed and successful account creation confirmation message appears or user is redirected to a welcome/account page

testCases.title: Signup with Name containing special characters
steps: Enter a valid unique name containing special characters (e.g., hyphens, apostrophes) into signupNameInput
Enter a valid unique email address into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Successful account creation confirmation message appears or user is redirected to a welcome/account page

f429c99460be3fb1.descPreview: Enter valid login credentials and click the Login button multiple times rapidly without waiting for

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with valid credentials
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 5 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System displays only one success or failure message and does not create multiple sessions or duplicate responses

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with invalid password
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 6 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System displays only one failure message indicating invalid credentials and prevents multiple error popups

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with empty email and password fields
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 7 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System displays validation messages for required fields only once and does not flood the user with repeated errors

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with SQL injection payload in email field
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 6 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects login attempts without exposing database errors and displays a single generic authentication failure message

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with maximum length email and password
steps: Enter a valid email of maximum allowed length into loginEmailInput
Enter a password of maximum allowed length into loginPasswordInput
Click loginButton rapidly 6 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System processes login attempts normally and displays only one success or failure message without errors or crashes

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with valid credentials and network delay simulation
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 7 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System queues or rate limits requests and shows only one success or failure message after network response

testCases.title: Rapid multiple login attempts with valid email and empty password
steps: Click loginButton rapidly 6 times without waiting for server response
testCases.expectedResult: System displays password required validation message only once and prevents multiple error messages

ebdf15ad46acaebd.descPreview: Enter a valid email address into the unnamed subscription field and click submit. Expected outcome:

testCases.title: Subscribe with a valid email address
steps: Enter a valid email address into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: You have been successfully subscribed!

testCases.title: Subscribe with an empty email field
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the email field cannot be empty

testCases.title: Subscribe with an invalid email format
steps: Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'invalid-email') into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid

testCases.title: Subscribe with an email address at maximum allowed length
steps: Enter a valid email address with maximum allowed length into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: You have been successfully subscribed!

testCases.title: Subscribe with an email address containing leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter a valid email address with leading and trailing spaces into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: You have been successfully subscribed!

testCases.title: Subscribe with a previously subscribed email address
steps: Enter the previously subscribed valid email address into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: An error message is displayed indicating the email is already subscribed

testCases.title: Subscribe with an email containing SQL injection attempt
steps: Enter an email containing SQL injection payload (e.g., "test@example.com'; DROP TABLE users;--") into subscriptionEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: The input is sanitized and an error message is displayed or subscription is rejected without affecting system integrity

2d6aa13846e7e630.descPreview: Enter a name or password string that matches the maximum allowed character limit (e.g., 256 characte

testCases.title: Signup with maximum length name and valid email
steps: Enter a valid email into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form accepts the 256-character name and valid email, proceeds with signup validation without error

testCases.title: Login with maximum length password and valid email
steps: Enter a valid email into loginEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form accepts the 256-character password and valid email, proceeds with login validation without error

testCases.title: Signup with name exceeding maximum length (257 characters)
steps: Enter a valid email into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form rejects input with validation error indicating name exceeds maximum allowed length

testCases.title: Login with password exceeding maximum length (257 characters)
steps: Enter a valid email into loginEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form rejects input with validation error indicating password exceeds maximum allowed length

testCases.title: Signup with maximum length name containing special characters
steps: Enter a 256-character string with special characters into signupNameInput
Enter a valid email into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form accepts the 256-character special character name and valid email, proceeds without error

testCases.title: Login with maximum length password containing SQL injection attempt
steps: Enter a valid email into loginEmailInput
Enter a 256-character string containing SQL injection pattern into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form accepts input but does not execute injection; login fails or succeeds only with valid credentials, no security breach

testCases.title: Signup with empty name and maximum length email
steps: Enter a 256-character valid email into signupEmailInput
testCases.expectedResult: Form rejects submission with validation error indicating name is required

de4e2d2ba95bc803.scenario: Login with Special Characters in Password
de4e2d2ba95bc803.descPreview: Enter a valid email address and attempt to log in using a password containing special characters (e.

testCases.title: Login with valid email and correct password containing special characters
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter the correct password containing special characters (e.g., P@ssw0rd!) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page

testCases.title: Login with valid email and incorrect password containing special characters
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter an incorrect password containing special characters (e.g., Wrong!@#) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed

testCases.title: Login with valid email and password containing only special characters
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter a password with only special characters (e.g., !@#$%^&) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed

testCases.title: Login with valid email and password containing special characters at boundary length (minimum length)
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter a password containing special characters with minimum allowed length (e.g., P@1!) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: If password matches stored hash, user is logged in; otherwise, login fails with invalid credentials message

testCases.title: Login with valid email and password containing special characters at boundary length (maximum length)
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter a password containing special characters with maximum allowed length (e.g., P@ssw0rd!LongMaxLength) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: If password matches stored hash, user is logged in; otherwise, login fails with invalid credentials message

testCases.title: Login attempt with valid email and password containing SQL injection special characters
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter a password containing SQL injection special characters (e.g., ' OR '1'='1!@#) into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and no authentication bypass occurs; error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed

testCases.title: Login attempt with valid email and password containing special characters and leading/trailing spaces
steps: Enter a valid email address into loginEmailInput
Enter a password containing special characters with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., ' P@ssw0rd! ') into loginPasswordInput
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails due to incorrect password including spaces or succeeds if spaces are trimmed and password matches stored hash
